heroHeadline: Hospital Bombed on Eid; 500+ Civilians Killed by Drones in March; RSF Retakes Bara
heroSubtitle: 64 killed including 13 children in Eid al-Fitr hospital strike in East Darfur; drone surge kills 500+ civilians in Kordofan and White Nile; RSF recaptures Bara and seizes Chad border town; Chad closes 1,300 km border after RSF cross-border drone kills 17
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, and Critical Threats Project
